song.title: How Majestic Is Your Name
song.author: Michael W. Smith
song.lyrics: [V1] . C O Lord, our Lord, . F C G How majestic is Your name in all the earth. . C O Lord, our Lord, . F C G How majestic is Your name in all the earth.|| .F G C O Lord, we praise Your name. .F G C O Lord, we magnify Your name. .Bm Em D G G7 C F G C Prince of Peace, Mighty God, O Lord God Almighty.
